testcase.name: test_dashboard_stats_matchday_counts

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing matchday status count: LIVE assert 'LIVE' in {'COMPLETED': 45, 'DRAFT': 6, 'LOCKED': 10, 'OPEN': 2}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_matchdays_giornate.py:179: in test_dashboard_stats_matchday_counts assert status in md_stats, f"Missing matchday status count: {status}" E AssertionError: Missing matchday status count: LIVE E assert 'LIVE' in {'COMPLETED': 45, 'DRAFT': 6, 'LOCKED': 10, 'OPEN': 2}

testcase.name: test_national_league_match_source

failure.message:
AssertionError: National league should have match_source_type='national' assert ('' == 'national'
- national or '' is None) + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9e94a799b00>('match_source_type') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9e94a799b00> = {'admins': [{'email': 'admin@fantapronostic.com', 'id': 'f0a01bb1-4b0c-4f6f-9c8e-a7b33b445651', 'role': 'admin', 'username': 'admin'}], 'bet_deadline_minutes': 5, 'competition_name': '', 'created_at': '2026-02-15T20:10:49.881868+00:00', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_matchdays_giornate.py:219: in test_national_league_match_source assert national.get("match_source_type") == "national" or national.get("match_source_type") is None, \ E AssertionError: National league should have match_source_type='national' E assert ('' == 'national' E E - national or '' is None) E + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9e94a799b00>('match_source_type') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9e94a799b00> = {'admins': [{'email': 'admin@fantapronostic.com', 'id': 'f0a01bb1-4b0c-4f6f-9c8e-a7b33b445651', 'role': 'admin', 'username': 'admin'}], 'bet_deadline_minutes': 5, 'competition_name': '', 'created_at': '2026-02-15T20:10:49.881868+00:00', ...}.get

skipped.message: No DRAFT matchday available to test status update
